response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff-level full-stack software craftsman with ~14 years of experience, but the role targets a Director-level Principal Engineer in AI strategy. The resume shows only recent, limited exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling at re:cinq since April 2025) and lacks the recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, cloud-scale strategic leadership, and advisory experience expected at this level.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering track record across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at scale
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, teaching, talks, OSS founder)
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at strategic scale
Lacks Director-level IC or principal-level strategic advisory experience with customers/partners
Limited cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK) versus the broad cloud/AI strategy scope required

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC scope
Breadth of engineering experience and craftsmanship
